---
title: "Voices Across Borders: "
subtitle: "Analyzing Public Discourse in the Latvian Emigration Press"
author: "Timur Mitrofanov"
date: "May 29, 2026"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    transition: slide
    controls: true
    width: 1400
    height: 800
    footer: "Voices Across Borders · Timur Mitrofanov"
    embed-resources: false
---

## Token Analysis

```{=html}
<iframe src="results_token_analysis.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

---

## Topic Word Scores

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="multi-gram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Unigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="unigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Bigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="bigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Trigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="trigram_topic_word_scores.html" width="100%" height="620px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

:::

## Intertopic Distance Map 

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="multi-gram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Unigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="unigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Bigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="bigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Trigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="trigram_intertopic_distance_map.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

:::

## Topics Over Time

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Multigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="multi-gram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Unigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="unigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Bigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="bigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

### Trigram
```{=html}
<iframe src="trigram_topics_over_time.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

:::

## Hierarchical Clustering (multigram)

```{=html}
<iframe src="nested_bertopic.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```


## Geographical and Geopolitical entities

```{=html}
<iframe src="Map_journal_origins_2.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```

## Most Mentioned Country by Month and Year
```{=html}
<iframe src="country_mentions_interactive.html" width="100%" height="680px"
  style="border:none; border-radius:8px; background:white;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
```
